data.name: Dungeon Epoch: Rebirth
data.detailed_description:
Dungeon Epoch: Rebirth

Long ago, all dungeons in the world were cleared of monsters and vanished into the annals of history. But now, after centuries, these mysterious dungeons are reappearing, filled with monsters, treasures, and ancient secrets. Get ready for an epic adventure in "Dungeon Epoch: Rebirth"!

Key Features

Epic Storyline: Immerse yourself in a captivating narrative where ancient dungeons resurface after ages of oblivion. Uncover the secrets lurking in their depths and discover what caused their sudden reappearance.

Powerful Heroine: Experience the adventure through the eyes of a remarkable heroine endowed with a unique power that allows her to explore the dungeons. Use your abilities to confront powerful enemies and overcome daunting challenges.

Resource Gathering and Crafting: In the game world, you'll find countless resources to collect and use to create powerful items. Build, craft, and upgrade your equipment to survive the dark dungeons.

Building System: Beyond combat and exploration, the game features an extensive building system. Create your bases, expand them, and manage resources to support your dungeon expeditions.

Diverse Dungeons: Each dungeon is unique, with diverse enemies, puzzles, and treasures. Explore their mysteries and collect valuable loot to become the ultimate adventurer.

Do you have the courage to uncover what lies in the dark depths of the dungeons? "Dungeon Epoch: Rebirth" awaits you with endless adventures, epic battles, and undiscovered secrets. Prepare for the journey of a lifetime!

Join our community and follow updates to stay informed about new challenges and additional content!

In the dungeons, collect rare resources and build all sorts of devices from them

You can also capture monsters there and turn them into your slaves

(optional) Futa content

data.short_description: Play as a heroine with the power to explore mysterious dungeons in an adult open-world RPG.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 4 core cpu
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 6GB
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 8 core cpu
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3060 8GB
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
